title: A Case of You
why_this_song: A Case of You by Joni Mitchell (1971) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 6 times; first heard in: "And I would still be on my feet"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "You taste so bitter"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Oh, you are in my blood like holy wine"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Oh, you are in my blood like holy wine"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Oh, you are in my blood like holy wine"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

Still I'd be on my feet

She had a mouth like yours

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "feet" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "feet" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "bitter" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "bitter" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Just before our love got lost, you said
Oh, I am a lonely painter
Still I'd be on my feet

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Part of you pours out of me
She had a mouth like yours

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "A Case of You" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "A Case of You"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Joni Mitchell one question about "A Case of You", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Joni Mitchell sobre "A Case of You", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "A Case of You" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "A Case of You" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
